vocab.meaning: ý thức về trình tự thời gian
vocab.example: Consistently wearing a watch heightens your chronological awareness, making you more mindful of how you allocate your day.
Having a timepiece on my wrist helps diminish the urge to constantly unlock my phone, which often leads to mindless scrolling.

vocab.meaning: đặc tính của sự đáng tin cậy
vocab.example: In many professional cultures, a watch is seen as a key attribute of reliability and a sign of a disciplined mind.

vocab.meaning: luồng công việc không bị gián đoạn
vocab.example: Checking the time on a watch ensures an uninterrupted workflow since you aren't distracted by smartphone notifications.

vocab.meaning: tín hiệu phi ngôn ngữ tinh tế
vocab.example: Wearing a watch serves as a subtle non-verbal cue to others that you respect both their schedule and your own.

vocab.meaning: sự lệ thuộc vào công nghệ
vocab.example: Using an analog watch is a small but effective way to reduce technological dependency in our digital-heavy lives.
Being able to glance at your wrist during a presentation can significantly heighten efficiency without breaking eye contact.

vocab.meaning: sự gắn kết/hài hòa về mặt thẩm mỹ
vocab.example: A well-chosen watch provides aesthetic cohesion to an outfit, making the wearer look more put-together.
A watch is a vital tool for those who need to strictly adhere to a schedule throughout a hectic workday.
I view wearing a watch as a meaningful vestige of tradition that emphasizes the timeless value of punctuality.
